1878990.name: Imaginarium Chronicles Seabeards Treasure
1878990.description:
Clay enters the Imaginarium as Kid Space Skull based on his Dad's favorite 1950s comic book. He must enter the deadly maze of Seabeard's castle and the catacombs below to find the old pirates' treasure to get one of the pieces of the Imaginarium map.
Much like games that came before like Hollow Knight, Dead Cells, Metroid Dread CHRONICLES of the IMAGINARIUM SEABEARDS TREASURE is a maze of twists and turns that reveals deadly villains from Lighting Bugs to Alien Huntarrs and of course Zombie Pirates.
1878990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
